author: bridge-bot
content: <b1afra> Apparently threads in Discord don't work well with the bridge.

author: bridge-bot
content:
<b1afra> re: **@Lightclient_bot**
> <dirkjaeckel> I made a POC to verify that a light client without a centralized server (JSON-RPC or otherwise) is possible. https://github.com/biafra23/devp2p-playground?tab=readme-ov-file#devp2p-playground Currently missing (AFAICT),  is the history of past transactions and the proofs for older block verification (plans for that are mentioned in the README.md). Block numbers (and indices) of past transaction will come from Trueblocks via IPFS.

I hope the limitations are mentioned properly in the README. Let me know if not. Also let me know if you have problems building and/or running this thing. Or open an issue, please.
Update: Trueblocks integration for past transactions is now exposed as: get-transactions <address>
